languages.text: "А в нынешние времена высокомерные чужаки вновь разгуливают по Янусу, считая его своей вотчиной. И это — результат вашего попустительства! Мне глубоко отвратителен сей факт, и я намерен исправить это".
languages.translation_comment:
[blueprint] Если эльдары остались живы под любым соусом
+десижен ссылка

[blueprint] Если эльдары остались живы под любым соусом
+десижен ссылка

languages.text: "And in this present age, arrogant xenos once again roam Janus, regarding it as their domain. This is the result of your indulgence. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."
languages.original_text: "А в нынешние времена высокомерные чужаки вновь разгуливают по Янусу, считая его своей вотчиной. И это — результат вашего попустительства! Мне глубоко отвратителен сей факт, и я намерен исправить это".

traits.locale_text: "And in this present age, arrogant aliens once again roam Janus, regarding it as their domain. This is the result of your indulgence. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."
"And in this present age, arrogant aliens once again roam Janus, regarding it as their domain. This is the result of your indulgence. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."
"And in this present age, arrogant aliens once again roam Janus, regarding it as their domain. This is the result of your indulgence. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."
"And in this present age, arrogant xenos once again roam Janus, regarding it as their domain. This is the result of your indulgence. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

languages.text: «Y en la actualidad, los arrogantes xenos campan de nuevo a sus anchas por Janus como si fuesen sus dominios. Todo esto es el fruto de su indulgencia. Encuentro esta situación absolutamente deleznable, y pretendo rectificarla».
languages.original_text: "And in this present age, arrogant xenos once again roam Janus, regarding it as their domain. This is the result of your indulgence. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

traits.locale_text: «Y en la actualidad, los arrogantes xenos campan de nuevo a sus anchas por Janus como si fuesen sus dominios. Todo esto es el fruto de su indulgencia. Encuentro esta situación absolutamente deleznable, y pretendo rectificarla».

languages.text: “而到了今天，傲慢的异形再次在加努斯上肆意横行，把那里视作自己的领地。这就是你纵容的结果。我对此深恶痛绝，必定要亲自纠正这一切。”
languages.original_text: "And in this present age, arrogant xenos once again roam Janus, regarding it as their domain. This is the result of your indulgence. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

traits.locale_text: “而到了今天，傲慢的异形再次在加努斯上肆意横行，把那里视作自己的领地。这就是你纵容的结果。我对此深恶痛绝，必定要亲自纠正这一切。”

languages.text: « Et à présent, des xénos arrogants se pavanent de nouveau sur Janus comme s'ils étaient chez eux. Voilà le triste résultat de votre inconséquence. Ce seul constat me révolte, et j'entends rectifier le tir. »
languages.original_text: "And in this present age, arrogant xenos once again roam Janus, regarding it as their domain. This is the result of your indulgence. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

traits.locale_text: « Et à présent, des xénos arrogants se pavanent de nouveau sur Janus comme s'ils étaient chez eux. Voilà le triste résultat de votre inconséquence. Ce seul constat me révolte, et j'entends rectifier le tir. »

languages.text: "Günümüzde kibirli zenolar Janus'ta yine cirit atıyor, orayı kendi bölgeleri olarak görüyorlar. Bu senin müsamahanın bir sonucu. Bu gerçeği son derece iğrenç buluyorum ve bunu düzeltmeye niyetliyim."
languages.original_text: "And in this present age, arrogant xenos once again roam Janus, regarding it as their domain. This is the result of your indulgence. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

traits.locale_text: "Günümüzde kibirli zenolar Janus'ta yine cirit atıyor, orayı kendi bölgeleri olarak görüyorlar. Bu senin müsamahanın bir sonucu. Bu gerçeği son derece iğrenç buluyorum ve bunu düzeltmeye niyetliyim."

languages.text: 「そしてこの現代において、傲慢な異種族が再びヤヌスを我が領土と見なし、その地を徘徊する。これは君たちの甘情に起因する。私はその事実を全く嫌悪し、それを是正するつもりだ。」
languages.original_text: "And in this present age, arrogant xenos once again roam Janus, regarding it as their domain. This is the result of your indulgence. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

traits.locale_text: 「そしてこの現代において、傲慢な異種族が再びヤヌスを我が領土と見なし、その地を徘徊する。これは君たちの甘情に起因する。私はその事実を全く嫌悪し、それを是正するつもりだ。」

languages.text: "Und in diesem Zeitalter betrachten Janus erneut hochmütige Außerirdische als ihr Reich. Das ist das Ergebnis Eurer Schwäche. Ich empfinde diesen Umstand als erschreckend und werde ihn korrigieren."
languages.original_text: "And in this present age, arrogant aliens once again roam Janus, regarding it as their domain. This is the result of your indulgence. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

traits.locale_text: "Und in diesem Zeitalter betrachten Janus erneut hochmütige Außerirdische als ihr Reich. Das ist das Ergebnis Eurer Schwäche. Ich empfinde diesen Umstand als erschreckend und werde ihn korrigieren."
